overview: This image features a venomous snake, likely a Cottonmouth (Agkistrodon piscivorus), displaying characteristic thick-bodied features and a prominent dark stripe through the eye. The snake is shown with its head raised in a defensive posture, a common behavior for this species when disturbed or threatened. The surrounding ground appears damp or wet, which is consistent with the semiaquatic habitat preferred by Cottonmouths. The surrounding ground appears damp or wet, which is consistent with the semiaquatic habitat preferred by Cottonmouths.
